title: 皐月賞の後に・制覇と慧眼

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. is in the lead! It's T.M. Opera O! She's pulling
away!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is victorious! The spotlight's on you
in this defining moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear it? It's the rustling of a new dawn!
Life has sprung forth to honor me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Do you know what MVT stands for? It's
Most Valuable T.M. Opera O! Who is that on this
day?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How right you are! I am acting in the leading role!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the most! I am the valuable! I am the Opera
O! Me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Greetings, fans! 'Tis I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't completely follow her, but it's clear how
elated she is.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you're disappointed, Ayabe. However,
there is no reason for regret.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your presence was vital to making the early spring rendition of Lo, Yon Beautiful Satsuki Sho such a resounding success.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wasn't... at my best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? How so?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You threw off my pace. My own weakness is to
blame...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But still, if you hadn't been around...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Yes, hate me! It is fitting for the rival to
despise the protagonist!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, Ayabe, was it really my fault that you weren't
at your best?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Either way, if this anger fuels your improvement, I
do not mind it in the least.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't know the first thing about me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do! I know it all! You are an
Umamusume who wished to prevail in the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the cause of your lapse in focus lies within
your own mind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Face your troubles as they arise, just as I face my
reflection in the mirror each day.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us be off, Trainer! Haah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning has made Opera O so happy that she
laughs with glee all the way home.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How did she... see right through me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She couldn't have. I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do I need to face myself?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight is a party! Everyone, dance the night
away!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll try, Opera O! But... I'm not all that good at
dancing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I've grown tired of dancing. Come along,
Trainer. We should step out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Onto the balcony at dusk—what better stage is
there for enchantment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She brings me out onto the roof.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've captured this one star, it is time
to set our sights on a new goal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What stage is worthy of my presence now that the
Satsuki crown is mine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The answer is already set. We have one crown, so
it's time to take the other two.
choice_data_list:
On to the Tokyo Racecourse for the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, as I expected. Very well. I shall make the sky
shine ever brighter over the supreme Classics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe will most likely... No, she will definitely run
there, bringing her own flair.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold, Trainer... The night sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That shining glimmer... It's the Derby Star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's pointing to the North Star... which now, as
I've just learned, has a new name.
